creator: michael.adm@gmail.com
text: You don't have to do the opposite side for Wireguard interfaces, since the wg interfaces in this bug may not work at all, but in my case, they work very well with load and traffic distribution. But to provide a secondary Internet provider, you need to switch routes (in the script, "route add" and "route delete") - and here - the problem - FATAL TRAP 12 :(
